prompt: Apply four color palette in the referenced image to four bars in the bar chart.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, the bar chart, using image 2 as a color palette reference. Update the colors of the four categories of bars as follows:
- Recolor the 'Graphic Design' bars (currently orange) to match the vibrant orange color of the bottom-left star in image 2.
- Recolor the 'Web Design' bars (currently pink) to match the vibrant pink/magenta color of the top-left star in image 2.
- Recolor the 'SEO Analysis' bars (currently purple) to match the vibrant yellow color of the top-right star in image 2.
- Recolor the 'Developer' bars (currently green) to match the vibrant green color of the bottom-right star in image 2.
Maintain the bar chart's original structure, data values, and overall layout.
objects: Data bars for 'Graphic Design' (recolored to vibrant orange)
Data bars for 'Web Design' (recolored to vibrant pink/magenta)
Data bars for 'SEO Analysis' (recolored to vibrant yellow)
Data bars for 'Developer' (recolored to vibrant green)
Numeric data labels on top of bars
Legend with text labels and recolored swatches
